description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On December 4, 2025 at 6:38 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in San Francisco, California was in a 
collision involving a heavy truck on 6th Street at Brannan Street.  
 
The Waymo AV was traveling southeastbound in the designated right turn lane on 6th Street with its right turn signal activated in 
preparation for a right turn onto Brannan Street. As the Waymo AV approached the intersection with Brannan Street, it slowed to a stop to 
yield to a heavy truck with an oversized trailer that was traveling southeastbound in the second from the right lane and partially in the 
designated right turn lane in close proximity to the Waymo AV. While the Waymo AV was stopped, the heavy truck continued to proceed 
forward and the right side of the heavy truck trailer made contact with the left side of the stationary Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, 
the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. The Waymo AV sustained damage. 
Print
Clear Form
